items.name: Walls - Entrance Hall
items.description: Cream emulsion paint to walls throughout entrance hall (visible in P061, P062). Walls are sound with standard texture.
defects: Light scuffing/marking visible at mid-to-high level on left wall and faint marks near corners (P061)

items.name: Skirting Boards - Entrance Hall
items.description: White painted wood skirting boards along base of perimeter walls.
defects: Light dust accumulation at floor junctions

items.name: Flooring - Entrance Hall
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring covering the entire visible floor area.
defects: Sound with light wear marks/scuffing consistent with hallway traffic flow (visible as faint darker patches)
Footprints/dust present in corners and edges

items.name: Socket Outlet - Left Wall
items.description: Double socket outlet with metallic/grey faceplate mounted on left wall at waist height.

items.name: Wardrobe Doors / Built-in Storage - Entrance Hall (Foreground)
items.description: Dark oak-effect laminate paneling or wardrobe doors visible in immediate foreground of P063 on left and right edges.
defects: Light dust accumulation typical for hallways at lower levels/knee height

items.name: Switches/Intercom Panel - Left Wall
items.description: Wall-mounted electrical switches and/or intercom buttons located on the left wall adjacent to the dark wood paneling.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: White painted plasterboard ceiling with recessed downlighter spotlights and a central smoke/heat alarm fixture.

items.name: Walls (Emulsioned)
items.description: Cream/off-white emulsion painted walls covering all hall surfaces.
defects: Faint scuffs/marks to emulsion at eye level (visible in P068/P072)

items.name: Skirting Boards
items.description: White painted wood/composite skirting boards fitted around base of walls and door frames.

items.name: Flooring (Laminate)
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring with wood grain texture, running lengthwise away from camera view.

items.name: Entryphone System
items.description: High level mounted on right hand wall, black framed digital display unit with keypad/buttons and screen.
defects: Faint dust/smudges to bezel/screen (visible in P069/P072)

items.name: Light Switches/Sockets Cluster
items.description: Mid to low level mounted on right hand wall adjacent to entryphone system. Visible cluster includes a vertical rocker light switch plate and an outlet/socket faceplate (silver/grey).

items.name: Door Frame (Left)
items.description: White painted wood door frame on left side leading to adjacent room/bedroom.

items.name: Walls (Hallway)
items.description: White painted walls.

items.name: Skirting Boards (Hallway)
items.description: White painted wood skirting boards, low level.

items.name: Entrance Door (Front)
items.description: Dark wood-effect finish, brass/gold handle and lockset, letter plate with mesh screen.
defects: Letter plate has smudges/dirt marks to edges and bottom rail.

items.name: Flooring (Hallway)
items.description: Light beige laminate/vinyl flooring.
defects: Flyer/Mail lying on floor at threshold area.

items.name: Flooring - Light wood effect laminate/vinyl (Hallway)
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring covering the main hallway area.

items.name: Flooring - Grey marble effect tiles (Threshold)
items.description: Grey porcelain or ceramic tiles with a white veining pattern, visible at the threshold area.

items.name: Flooring - Brown speckled carpet (Background room)
items.description: Brown, multi-coloured speckled wall-to-wall carpet visible in the background area.
defects: Yellow circular sticker '20' adhered to floor surface

items.name: Walls - White emulsion paint
items.description: White painted walls throughout the entrance hall.

items.name: Skirting boards - Painted white wood/MDF
items.description: White painted skirting boards matching the wall colour.

items.name: Door frame - White painted wood (Entrance Hall)
items.description: White painted door frames visible at the entrance to the cupboard.

items.name: Digital Display Screen / Intercom Unit
items.description: Black framed digital display screen mounted on the wall, showing time and date.

items.name: Light Switches x2 (Chrome faceplates)
items.description: Two chrome-finished light switches mounted on the wall.

items.name: Cupboard Door - White painted wood (Entrance Hall)
items.description: White painted wooden door leading into the storage cupboard.

items.name: Cupboard Shelving Unit (Wood-effect)
items.description: Fixed wooden shelf unit inside the entrance hall cupboard.

items.name: Hanging Rail & Hangers x12 (approx)
items.description: Metal hanging rail with approximately a dozen plastic hangers attached inside the cupboard.

items.name: Magazine / Booklet (Loose item)
items.description: A magazine or booklet lying on the floor near the tile transition.

items.name: Walls (Alcove/Utility Area)
items.description: White emulsion painted walls visible in high-angle view. Sound with scuffs/marks at mid-level on left and right hand side near top edge of frame.
defects: scuffs mid level to wall surface (left and right)

items.name: Skirting Boards (Alcove/Utility Area)
items.description: White painted woodwork at base of walls visible in high-angle view.

items.name: Flooring (Alcove/Utility Area)
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring visible in high-angle view.
defects: minor wear marks to floorboards (standard wear)

items.name: Door Frame/Edge (Right Side)
items.description: White painted woodwork visible on right edge of frame in high-angle view.

items.name: Door Handle (Right Side)
items.description: Silver/chrome door handle visible on edge of open door frame right side.

items.name: Chrome Leg/Stand (Left Side)
items.description: Metallic leg visible on left edge of frame in high-angle view, likely part of coat rack or stand.

items.name: Light Switch Panel (Left)
items.description: Silver/chrome finish, 4-gang rocker switches mounted on wall panel.

items.name: Switch/Socket Cover (Center)
items.description: Black/glossy single gang switch or socket cover mounted on wall panel.

items.name: Digital Display Panel (Right)
items.description: Black framed digital screen displaying 'Home Control Settings' mounted on wall panel.
